title: Flying Devils
writer: Louis Stevens, Byron Morgan, Gene Fowler
actors: Arline Judge, Bruce Cabot, Eric Linden
plot: Anny Hardy is a parachute-stunt diver with a flying-circus group of barnstorming pilots which her husband, "Speed" Hardy heads. She meets and falls in love with Bud Murray, the younger brother of her husbands partner "Ace" Murray,...
